name: Corridor Scan for Irrigation Canal Inspection
description: You are an Agricultural Technician planning a thermal inspection of an irrigation canal to detect seepage and structural damage using a UAV. Based on the inspection brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/canal_inspection_brief.txt, create a Corridor Scan mission in QGroundControl following the specified canal coordinates. Configure the mission for a FLIR Vue Pro R 640 camera with a flight altitude achieving 8 cm/pixel GSD, a corridor width of 80 meters, 70% frontal overlap, and 60% side overlap. Save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/canal_inspection.plan
